_comment: Phase 1 §1.J semantic-golden fixture for Form 1301. See semanticGolden135.expected.json for the layout description, Hebrew-glyph-reversal caveat, and 1.D BiDi-rewrite TODO. `stampedPerPage[i]` is the ORDERED list of values the route paints at the tail of page (i+1). `requiredCodes` is the set of 3-digit codes from the route's draws[] list that the template MUST still print (subset; codes 277/278 are spouse / taxpayer ID page-3 duplicates that the template prints).
